findings.description: factor 'product_channel' was last observed 2024-02-01, older than the 365-day freshness window; refresh before relying on it
factor 'pep_status' is at maximum risk and forces a rating floor of 'High' under the approved methodology
recomputed band 'High' differs from the rating of record 'Low' by 2 band(s); the customer appears under-rated
override (High -> Low) expired 2025-12-31; the rating of record may be relying on a lapsed override
trigger event 'adverse_media' (2026-06-20, severity high) has not been assessed and may warrant a re-rating or enhanced due diligence

recommended_next_steps: Route to enhanced-due-diligence-packager to assemble source-of-funds/wealth and ownership evidence.
Route the adverse-media trigger to adverse-media-investigator for entity-resolved assessment.
A qualified compliance officer / MLRO adjudicates the rating; this skill does not change it.

narrative: Recomputation of customer ****4021 under methodology crr-methodology-2026.06 (as of 2026-07-15) yields a weighted score of 71.0% and a model band of High, floored to High because the customer is a domestic PEP. The rating of record is Low, effective 2025-06-01, and appears to rely on a downgrade override (High to Low) that lapsed on 2025-12-31. A high-severity adverse-media trigger from 2026-06-20 is not yet assessed, and one factor (product_channel) is stale. Recommended review outcome: Escalate-For-Adjudication. Recommend the adjudicator consider re-rating toward High and initiating enhanced due diligence; route the adverse-media trigger for entity-resolved assessment.
